en-US.title: Timeo - Book & Shop Local
en-US.subtitle: Appointments, POS & Loyalty
en-US.description:
Timeo is your all-in-one app for discovering and booking services at your favourite local businesses — gyms, salons, cafes, clinics, and more.

Book appointments, browse products, make purchases, earn loyalty rewards, and manage your memberships, all from one beautiful app.

Key Features:
• Book appointments at gyms, salons, spas, clinics & more
• Browse products and menus from local businesses
• Make secure payments via FPX, eWallets (TNG, Boost, GrabPay), and cards
• Earn and redeem loyalty points at participating businesses
• Manage memberships and track visit history
• Receive real-time booking confirmations and reminders
• View digital receipts for all transactions
• QR code check-in at participating venues

Timeo connects you with the best service-based and retail businesses in Malaysia. Whether you are booking a personal training session, ordering your morning coffee, or scheduling a haircut — Timeo makes it simple.

Built for Malaysia, expanding across Southeast Asia.
en-US.promotionalText: Book appointments, earn rewards, and shop local — all in one app.
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial release of Timeo for iOS. Book appointments, browse products, and manage your loyalty rewards at local businesses across Malaysia.

review.notes:
This is a multi-tenant business platform. For testing, use the demo account:

Email: customer@demo.my
Password: Demo1234!

This will show the Iron Paradise Gym demo tenant with sample services, products, and bookings.
